daily.today_energy: Your vibe is giving main character energy today, Libra. The cosmos is nudging you toward authenticity—stop people-pleasing for five seconds and let your real self shine through. You've got this.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, today's about quality connections over quantity. If you're with someone, a genuine conversation hits different. Single? Your energy is magnetic right now.
daily.career: Your ideas are flowing, and people are actually listening. Trust your instincts on that project or decision you've been sitting with. Small actions today plant seeds for bigger wins later.
daily.health: Your body's asking for a reset—maybe that means stepping outside, moving intentionally, or just drinking more water. Listen to what feels good instead of forcing a routine that doesn't fit.
